Grant of Rights & Release

I, , hereby grant to ("Production Company") and its clients, licensees, and assigns, the irrevocable right and permission to use, reproduce, edit, alter, modify, publish, and display photographs, video footage, and recordings of my likeness, voice, and/or performance captured during the production of .

I acknowledge that this material may be used in connection with any form of advertising, promotion, marketing, digital media, broadcast, social media, web content, editorial, or other commercial or non-commercial purposes, as determined by Production Company or its clients, without further consent from or payment to me (except as specified below).

I release Production Company, its officers, employees, agents, and clients from any and all claims, damages, or liability arising from or related to the use of my likeness, name, or performance in connection with this project. This release includes, but is not limited to, claims of defamation, invasion of privacy, right of publicity, or copyright infringement.

I represent that I am of legal age (), have the right to enter into this agreement, and that the use of my likeness will not violate any prior commitments or agreements I have made with any third party.

This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of and constitutes the entire agreement between the parties with respect to its subject matter.

Authorized Usage Rights (Check all that apply)
Digital / OnlineWebsite, YouTube, social platforms
Social MediaInstagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook
Commercial / AdvertisingPaid ads, promoted content
Broadcast / TVTelevision, streaming platforms
Print / OutdoorBillboards, print ads, brochures
Filmmaker PortfolioProduction company showreel / demo
Editorial / PressNews, articles, press releases
Worldwide / PerpetualNo geographic or time restriction
Compensation
Payment Type
Amount / Terms
If the above-named talent is a minor (under 18 years of age), a parent or legal guardian must also sign below. By signing, the parent/guardian affirms they have the legal authority to grant these rights on behalf of the minor.
Guardian Full Name
Relationship to Talent
Guardian Phone
Guardian Email
Talent Signature
Print Full Name
Signature
Date

Signature
Date

Signature
Date
Note: This release form is provided as a general template for filmmaker use. It should be reviewed by a qualified attorney before use in formal or high-stakes productions. How It's Filmed makes no representations regarding the legal enforceability of this document in any particular jurisdiction. Always consult local laws regarding model releases, minor consent, and commercial usage rights.
